name: voiceflow
description: Local voice-to-text desktop app for Windows
author: VoiceFlow

scripts.dev: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :5173',{stdio:'pipe'}).toString().split('\n').forEach(l=>{const m=l.match(/LISTENING\s+(\d+)/);if(m)try{process.kill(parseInt(m[1]));console.log('Killed port 5173 process:',m[1])}catch(e){}})}catch(e){}console.log('Starting...')" && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173?timeout=15000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.dev:first-run: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :5173',{stdio:'pipe'}).toString().split('\n').forEach(l=>{const m=l.match(/LISTENING\s+(\d+)/);if(m)try{process.kill(parseInt(m[1]));console.log('Killed port 5173 process:',m[1])}catch(e){}})}catch(e){}console.log('Starting...')" && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173?timeout=15000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development VOICEFLOW_FIRST_RUN=1 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
